## Wall Street Analyst Makes Bull Case for SpaceX Stock with Over 450% Upside

A 450%+ bull case from a named analyst signals high conviction on the space economy theme, but the headline's own skeptical framing suggests the market has not validated the thesis; relevant for position sizing and entry timing given limited float and high uncertainty.

- At least one Wall Street analyst has published a bull case projecting SpaceX shares could rise more than 450%.
- Coverage frames the call as aspirational, with the headline itself questioning the probability of it playing out.
- SpaceX (SPCX) is a recently-listed or pre-IPO name; liquidity and float constraints make analyst targets harder to act on than for large-caps.
- No specific valuation methodology, revenue estimate, or financial figure is cited in the available headlines.
